header: Numbered Feature Section for polished feature narrative
subheadline: Frames product value with strong hierarchy, modern media support, and scannable details for every viewport.

items.title: Value spotlight
items.description: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this numbered feature section easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.

items.title: Workflow advantage
items.description: The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.

items.title: Capability layer
items.description: A sharp, production-minded numbered feature section using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so product teams can show value with clean, scannable sections.
